airplane.label: Airplane
airplane.info: A wrecked aircraft serving as a fixed regional landmark.

spawn-point.label: Spawn Point
spawn-point.info: A common starting location when first entering a region.

bridge.label: Bridge
bridge.info: A structure spanning a gap, ravine, or frozen waterway.

car.label: Vehicle
car.info: An abandoned vehicle that may contain useful supplies.

cliff.label: Cliff
cliff.info: A steep rock face that may require a rope to ascend or descend.

train-car.label: Train Car
train-car.info: A derailed or stationary railway car that may contain supplies.

transition.label: Transition Point
transition.info: A passage connecting this region to an adjacent one.

tunnel.label: Tunnel
tunnel.info: A passage through terrain that may serve as a region connection.

landmark.label: Landmark
landmark.info: A notable fixed feature used as a navigational reference point.

grain-silo.label: Grain Silo
grain-silo.info: A tall cylindrical storage structure serving as a fixed regional landmark.

waterfall.label: Waterfall
waterfall.info: A cascading water feature useful as a navigational landmark.

bear-cave.label: Bear Cave
bear-cave.info: A cave that serves as a bear's den and sleeping area.

building.label: Building
building.info: An enclosed structure providing shelter from wind, cold, and wildlife.

destroyed-building.label: Destroyed Building
destroyed-building.info: A ruined structure offering only partial shelter.

cave.label: Cave
cave.info: A natural rock shelter providing protection from wind and wildlife.

fishing-hut.label: Fishing Hut
fishing-hut.info: A small ice-fishing shelter typically containing a fishing hole and stove.

trailer.label: Trailer
trailer.info: A small mobile structure providing basic shelter and loot.

mine.label: Mine
mine.info: An underground tunnel system that may connect to an adjacent region.

bed.label: Bed
bed.info: Allows the player to sleep, pass time, and restore condition.

computer.label: Computer
computer.info: A terminal that may contain readable notes or lore.

fire-barrel.label: Fire Barrel
fire-barrel.info: An outdoor metal barrel used as a heat source and fire-starting station.

fireplace.label: Fireplace
fireplace.info: A fixed indoor hearth used for warmth, cooking, and melting snow.

fishing-hole.label: Fishing Hole
fishing-hole.info: An opening in the ice used for ice fishing.

forge.label: Forge
forge.info: A high-temperature furnace required for crafting and repairing metal tools.

pot-belly-stove.label: Pot Belly Stove
pot-belly-stove.info: A small cast-iron stove found in outbuildings and fishing huts.

stove.label: Stove
stove.info: A kitchen appliance used for cooking food and melting snow.

wood-stove.label: Wood Stove
wood-stove.info: A wood-burning stove used for warmth and cooking.

workbench.label: Workbench
workbench.info: A crafting surface used to make and repair clothing and equipment.

ammo-workbench.label: Ammunition Workbench
ammo-workbench.info: A specialized bench used to hand-load rifle and revolver ammunition.

radio.label: Trader's Radio
radio.info: A DLC radio used to contact Mathis and access the trading system.

vaughns-rifle.label: Vaughn's Rifle
vaughns-rifle.info: A unique DLC bolt-action rifle belonging to Vaughn, found in a fixed location.

barb-rifle.label: Barb's Rifle
barb-rifle.info: A unique DLC bolt-action rifle belonging to Barb, found in a fixed location.

rifle.label: Rifle
rifle.info: A bolt-action hunting rifle effective for long-range game hunting.

hunters-revolver.label: Hunter's Revolver
hunters-revolver.info: A DLC high-calibre revolver capable of fending off predators.

revolver.label: Revolver
revolver.info: A reliable sidearm used for hunting and self-defence at close range.

distress-pistol.label: Distress Pistol
distress-pistol.info: A single-shot flare gun that can deter wildlife and signal for help.

bow.label: Bow
bow.info: A craftable survival bow used for silent, reusable hunting.

hatchet.label: Hatchet
hatchet.info: A multi-purpose hand tool used for chopping wood and as a melee weapon.

hacksaw.label: Hacksaw
hacksaw.info: A cutting tool used to harvest metal and open certain locked containers.

knife.label: Knife
knife.info: A fixed-blade tool used for harvesting carcasses and skinning hides.

lantern.label: Storm Lantern
lantern.info: A fuel-powered light source used to illuminate dark interiors and caves.

hammer.label: Hammer
hammer.info: A heavy tool required for forge work and certain crafting recipes.

prybar.label: Prybar
prybar.info: A metal lever used to force open locked containers and as a basic defensive tool.

tools.label: Simple Tools
tools.info: A set of hand tools that improves the quality of items crafted at a workbench.

quality-tools.label: Quality Tools
quality-tools.info: A premium set of hand tools providing the highest crafting quality bonus.

rope.label: Rope
rope.info: A climbing rope anchored at cliff faces to enable vertical traversal.

backpack.label: Backpack
backpack.info: An abandoned pack that may contain a variety of useful supplies.

book.label: Skill Book
book.info: A book that permanently improves one of the player's survival skills.

coal.label: Coal
coal.info: A fossil fuel used as a long-burning fire accelerant.

corpse.label: Corpse
corpse.info: A frozen body that may be carrying clothing, food, and equipment.

first-aid.label: First Aid
first-aid.info: A medical kit containing bandages, antiseptic, and pain medication.

memento-cache.label: Memento Cache
memento-cache.info: A hidden container holding story-related keepsakes.

metal-box.label: Metal Container
metal-box.info: A metal storage container holding a variety of supplies.

plastic-box.label: Plastic Container
plastic-box.info: A plastic storage container holding a variety of supplies.

trade-drop-box.label: Trade Drop Box
trade-drop-box.info: A DLC drop box used to exchange items with the trader Mathis.

emergency-stim.label: Emergency Stim
emergency-stim.info: A DLC injectable stimulant that temporarily boosts condition and stamina.

supply-cache.label: Supply Cache
supply-cache.info: A DLC airdrop container filled with a selection of useful supplies.

wolf.label: Wolf
wolf.info: An aggressive canine that stalks, bluffs, and charges the player.

wolf-carcass.label: Wolf Carcass
wolf-carcass.info: The remains of a wolf, harvestable for meat, hide, and gut.

bear.label: Bear
bear.info: A large predator capable of mauling the player and causing severe injury.

moose.label: Moose
moose.info: A territorial ungulate that charges when approached or surprised.

cougar.label: Cougar
cougar.info: A stealthy feline predator that ambushes the player from concealment.

rabbit.label: Rabbit
rabbit.info: A small, fast animal that can be snared or stunned for meat and hide.

deer.label: Deer
deer.info: A common ungulate hunted for large quantities of meat, hide, and gut.

ptarmigan.label: Ptarmigan
ptarmigan.info: A small ground bird hunted for meat using rocks or firearms.

deer-carcass.label: Deer Carcass
deer-carcass.info: The remains of a deer, harvestable for meat, hide, and gut.

cat-tails.label: Cat Tails
cat-tails.info: A wetland plant harvested for edible cattail stalks.

birch-bark.label: Birch Bark
birch-bark.info: Bark stripped from birch trees, used as a fire accelerant.

maple-sapling.label: Maple Sapling
maple-sapling.info: A flexible sapling harvested and cured to craft arrow shafts.

birch-sapling.label: Birch Sapling
birch-sapling.info: A flexible sapling harvested and cured to craft arrow shafts.

rose-hips.label: Rose Hips
rose-hips.info: A small fruit brewed into rose hip tea to restore the player's condition.

lichen.label: Old Man's Beard Lichen
lichen.info: A lichen brewed into tea that reduces fatigue and restores warmth.

reishi-mushrooms.label: Reishi Mushrooms
reishi-mushrooms.info: A fungus brewed into tea that improves condition and reduces pain.

salt-deposits.label: Salt Deposits
salt-deposits.info: A mineral deposit harvested for use in food preservation and curing.

burdock-roots.label: Burdock Roots
burdock-roots.info: Roots brewed into a tea that provides minor treatment for infections.

oak-tree.label: Oak Tree
oak-tree.info: A hardwood tree harvested for high-quality firewood and coal.

cairn.label: Cairn
cairn.info: A stacked stone marker that may contain a note or be part of a challenge.

polaroid.label: Polaroid
polaroid.info: A photograph depicting a location, collected as part of an in-game challenge.

scrawled-message.label: Scrawled Message
scrawled-message.info: A handwritten note left by a survivor, containing story or lore.

note-left-behind.label: Note Left Behind
note-left-behind.info: A personal note left at a location, providing story context or survivor history.

film.label: Film Box
film.info: A DLC film canister collected as part of a photography challenge.
